_meta.note: Canonical schema for .planning/config.json. Source of truth for keys, types, enums, and defaults. Validated by bin/config.mjs; the cad-config workflow catalog is derived from this. Enum provenance: [repo] = pinned in DESIGN/references; [proposed] = plausible label the executing model honors, no runtime validator beyond membership.
_meta.types: bool | int | string | string_or_null | enum | array_string | array_enum. int accepts an optional 'min'. enum/array_enum carry 'values'.

granularity.purpose: How finely phases split into tasks (new-project maps coarse 3-5 / standard 5-8 / fine 8-12 phases)

model.profile.purpose: Model routing: fast/balanced/quality canned tiers, or auto (role + difficulty, escalate on failure)

model.auto.escalate_on_failure.purpose: Bump the tier after a failed attempt

model.auto.max_escalations.purpose: How many times to escalate before giving up

workflow.research.purpose: Run a research pass before planning

workflow.plan_check.purpose: Gate plans through the checker before code

workflow.subagent_timeout.purpose: ms before a subagent is killed

workflow.inline_plan_threshold.purpose: Task count at/below which a plan runs inline vs its own doc

workflow.test_command.purpose: Command Cadence runs to test (null = none)

parallelization.use_worktrees.purpose: Isolate parallel writes in git worktrees

git.protected_branches.purpose: Branches Cadence won't commit to directly

git.on_protected.purpose: What to do on a protected branch (DESIGN §5, git rails)

git.integration_branch.purpose: Two-tier branch model: 'milestone' creates a per-milestone integration branch as the reconciliation point parallel worktrees fork from and merge into; 'trunk' creates no integration branch and commits land on the base governed by on_protected

git.auto_branch.purpose: How the integration branch is created at cycle start: 'ask' prompts once, 'auto' creates/switches silently, 'off' stays put

git.base_branch.purpose: Branch new work branches off (null = current)

memory.backend.purpose: Where notes/observations route: 'builtin' runs zero-dep BM25 recall over .planning/, 'none' disables recall

review.key_file.purpose: Path override for the provider key env file (never a key)

review.providers.openai.tiers.flagship.purpose: OpenAI model id for the flagship tier (set by --review)

review.providers.openai.tiers.balanced.purpose: OpenAI model id for the balanced tier

review.providers.openai.tiers.cheap.purpose: OpenAI model id for the cheap tier

review.providers.gemini.tiers.flagship.purpose: Gemini model id for the flagship tier

review.providers.gemini.tiers.balanced.purpose: Gemini model id for the balanced tier

review.providers.gemini.tiers.cheap.purpose: Gemini model id for the cheap tier

review.triggers.phase_diff.gate.purpose: Opt-in aggregate review of the merged phase diff after parallel execution (per-plan reviews never see cross-plan interactions)

review.triggers.phase_diff.tier.purpose: Model tier for the merged-phase review

review.triggers.phase_diff.effort.purpose: Reasoning effort for the merged-phase review

review.consult.enabled.purpose: Allow a second-model consult at dead-ends

review.consult.attempt_threshold.purpose: Failed fix attempts (or red-test iterations) on one bug before cad-debug offers a consult
